ol.li: Alignment: The ProcessRegistry entry MUST be 128-byte aligned to prevent entries spanning cache lines.
False Sharing: Identity fields (read/write frequent) are in CL0, Statistics (read-heavy, write-rare) in CL1.
Atomic Access: All field accesses must use std::atomic (C++) or sync/atomic (Go) with explicit memory ordering.

ul.li: PIDs are reused by the OS after wrap-around.
Generation increments on every registration in that slot.
Verification: current_gen == expected_gen prevents sending messages to a new process that inherited an old PID.

g.text: STARTING (PID assigned, heartbeat not yet valid)
func (r *Registry) IsAlive(slot uint32, expectedGen uint32) bool {
